subparts.text: Write a short note on Human Resource Information System .
Explain Human Resource Development and its relation with HRM.
What is the difference between job description and a job specification?
Write a job advertisement for one of the following positions: HRM professor, home-care worker, professional basketballer.
Distinguish between training, learning and development.
Distinguish between performance appraisal and performance management.

What do the following terms mean: ethnocentric, polycentric, regiocentric and geocentric. Future of SHRM The future of SHRM is difficult to predict, but likely to be influenced by: different products and services; more competitive local and global industries; greater use of technology; diverse jobs and workplaces; the gig economy; different employee expectations of jobs and careers; and new workplace issues such as environmental issues, corporate governance and CSR.
Which new HR roles and competencies might be expected in the future?
Write the difference between HRM and personnel management.
What is human capital, and how does it differ from traditional views of labor?

questions.question_text: What is downsizing, and why do organizations resort to it? Discuss its impact on employees and organizational performance.

subparts.text: Compare internal and external sources of recruitment. Which would you recommend for a growing organization, and why?
Suggest innovative selection methods that organizations can use to assess candidates for creative roles.
Analyze the ethical dilemmas associated with moonlighting.
Also, evaluate the pros and cons of permitting moonlighting in organizations.

questions.question_text: Identify a particular need in an organization and put the data in ADDIE model of training. List and briefly explain each of the steps in the training process.
Explain the difference between competency-based and traditional pay/compensation plans. 2

subparts.text: Do you feel that Eric was being exploited by the refuse collectors? Local authority officials heard about what Eric was doing and said it had to stop.

Why do you think they made this decision? Do you agree with it? A personnel manager in the neighborhood heard about Eric and arranged for him to be taught to operate a sewing machine. He was then employed in the personnel manager’s factory to maintain and repair all the overalls, a straightforward job carried out skillfully and conscientiously.
Do you feel that Eric was being exploited by the personnel manager?
Define Green HRM and explain its significance in achieving organizational sustainability.
How can an organization integrate Green HRM practices into its recruitment and selection process? Provide examples.
